description_long: This is a robust, metallic helmet with a dark, slightly reflective surface, reminiscent of historical or medieval armor. The helmet features a pronounced crest running from front to back along the top, adding structural strength and a distinctive silhouette. The front opening is wide, providing ample visibility and ventilation for the wearer, and the lower edge curves outward to protect the jaw and neck. The surface is smooth with subtle signs of wear, giving it an authentic, battle-worn appearance. There are no visible decorative elements, logos, or modern attachments, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The interior is likely hollow, designed to fit snugly over the head, with no visible padding or retention system.
description: A dark, metallic, medieval-style helmet with a pronounced crest and wide front opening, featuring a smooth, slightly reflective surface and no visible decorations.
description_view_0: Side view showing the helmet's curved profile, pronounced crest, and outward-flaring lower edge.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide facial opening and symmetrical design, with the crest centered on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 0, with the smooth metallic surface and outward-flaring lower edge visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full length of the crest and the rounded back of the helmet, with no openings or attachments.
